error_signature: workflow stops without triggering 'No items left'
title: Workflow stops when last item is false in SplitInBatches
symptom: The workflow completes successfully without triggering 'No items left' when the last item processed is false. This results in the loop not continuing as expected.
not_this_if: Workflow is designed to handle empty outputs
root_cause: The SplitInBatches node does not handle cases where the last item processed returns false, causing the workflow to complete without triggering the expected 'No items left' message. This happens because the false branch does not connect back to the loop, preventing further processing.
fix_steps: Connect the 'false' output of the IF node back to the input of the SplitInBatches node.
Ensure that the loop can continue processing even when the last item is false.
agent_instruction: Connect the false branch of the IF node back to the SplitInBatches input to allow the loop to continue.
